verses.text: A sisa thote in paknamtui bung sungah a om paknamtui uihsak thei a, haitatna themno khat in pilna lianpen susia thei hi
Mipilte a manin a gamtat ding a ngeina hi a, mihaite a sia-in a gamtat ding a ngeina ahi hi
Mihaite lampi-ah a paikawm nangawnin hai tat uh a, a haina uh mi khempeuh theisak uh hi
Nang tungah gam ukpa a heh leh na nasep za taisan pah kei in. Dai tak-a om hithiatna in khialhna lianpi maisak thei hi
Hih leitungah a thumanlo gam ukte' pian'sak ka muhte
Mihaite, zalianpi kipia a, mihaute kiniamkoih suk hi
Sakol tungah silate tuang a, miliante, sila bangin a khe-un pai uh hi
Gum a tote gum sung mahah kia ding a, mi' phung a phelsakte gul in tu ding hi
Suang a tokhiate suang mah in liamsak ding a, sing a ekte sing ehna mahah liam ding hi
I hei mawlnapi-in i tat kei leh nakpi takin sat kul a, ngaihsut masak ding pilhuai zaw hi
Gul khimthei napi i khim kei leh a kiman'na om tuanlo hi; gul in hong tu veve ding hi
Mipilte' kampauna in pahtawina ngahsak a, mihaite' kampauna in amau mah siasak hi
Thugen a kipat ciangun bangtumlo teng tawh kipan pah ma-lam uh a, gitloh vai teng tawh a thugen a khum lel uh hi
Mihaite in thu gengenin ciakciak uh hi. Mailam-a thupiang ding kuamah in theilo a, a sih khit-a thupiang ding a hong gen thei omlo hi
A inn zuatna ding lampi a theilo mihai luate bek, a inn lam zon'na-in gim ding uh hi
A kumpipa mi' cih bangbangin gamta lel a, zankhuavak-in zune makai-a a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh in lungkhamna thuak hi
A kumpipa in lungsim khentatna nei thei a, a makaite in annek tuidawn a hun thei a, amau ki-uk thei-in zu a khamlo makai a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh a hampha gam ahi hi
Thadah lua-in a inn vang nangawn a hu nuamlo mipa, a inn keh ding a, a inn nangawn in puklawh ding hi
An in lung damsak a, zu in lung nuamsak hi. Sum in ahih leh na khempeuh a kicingsak hi
Na lungsim nangawnah kumpipa gensia kei in. Kuama zaklohna mun na lupna tung nangawnah mihaute samsia kei in. Thopi in na thugen teng na puakkha ding hi.
